title: PM Decision-History Timestamp Normalization
objective: Harden the existing decision-history read endpoint so memory-backed audit events and persisted audit rows sort and expose timestamps consistently before any wider PM timeline or history UI is admitted.
required_inputs: PM Lane 004 read-only lens and last-PM-disposition context
constrained_outputs: Decision-history read rows now include a normalized timestamp value derived from timestamp, server_timestamp, or client_timestamp
Decision-history sorting now uses the same timestamp fallback order for memory and persisted audit shapes
Focused tests prove return_to_lead history exposes memory server_timestamp as timestamp and mixed timestamp shapes sort newest-first
No frontend UI change, no new endpoint, no mutation endpoint change, no SQL or schema migration, no service admission, no auth or ingress widening, and no autonomous AI business-state action
validation_steps: Run focused mutation-seam PM workfront read-model, PM issue disposition, and pipeline integration pytest slices with SEAM_STORE_BACKEND=memory
Run packet JSON validation and git diff whitespace checks before publication
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-005 changes only the read endpoint projection and memory-focused tests. No SQL, schema migration, production data write, auth, ingress, or new mutation authority is authorized.
